status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Create a new conversation
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can click New Chat and see a fresh empty conversation.
verification: Verify a new conversation appears in the sidebar.
Verify the main panel shows an empty conversation state.

features.title: Send a message in the current conversation
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can submit a message and see it appear in the active thread.
verification: Type a message into the input.
Verify the new message appears in the thread.

features.title: Persist the active conversation list
features.user_visible_behavior: A user sees previously created conversations after restarting the app.
verification: Verify both conversations still appear in the sidebar.
